title: Add logo to transfer page
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Adds the logo to the transfer page.  You can never have too many selkies!

comments.body:
It says something about the stability of our test suite that adding a logo to the docs causes unit test failures...

Restarting flakes
